jobs.title: Sr. Manager – Data Center & B2B AI Marketing (US & Europe)
jobs.description:
MediaTek is a global fabless semiconductor industry leader, providing solutions from the edge to the cloud and powering over 2 billion connected devices every year. Established in 1997, our leading-edge technologies keep the world connected and enhance everyday life. At the forefront of innovation, MediaTek drives advancements in transformative technologies such as AI, 5G/6G, and Wi-Fi 8. Our high-performance, power-efficient solutions form the foundation for a smarter, more connected world, enabling devices from smartphones, smart homes, and AI PCs to high-performance computing, automotive, and AI data centers. As a trusted partner to the world's leading brands, we are committed to ensuring access to world-class technology for everyone. Our dedication to accelerating AI underscores our mission to enrich the future of humanity.

About the Role
Are you a strategic B2B marketer with a deep passion for the data center and AI infrastructure space who thrives at the intersection of cutting-edge technology and high-impact marketing? MediaTek is looking for a results-oriented Sr. Manager of Data Center & B2B AI Marketing to join our growing marketing team supporting the US and Europe regions — a rare and exciting opportunity to shape and own the go-to-market narrative for one of the company's highest-priority and fastest-growing business areas. The ideal candidate brings a powerful combination of deep technical market fluency, B2B enterprise marketing expertise, and a proven ability to build compelling visuals and assets that resonate with senior-level audiences including hyperscalers, cloud service providers, OEMs, and enterprise IT decision-makers. You will serve as both a strategic architect and a hands-on executor — translating complex AI and data center technology stories into differentiated messaging and integrated marketing programs that drive pipeline, awareness, and influence. If you are curious, commercially minded, and ready to make a measurable impact at one of the world's leading semiconductor companies, we want to hear from you.


________________________________________
What You'll Do
As the Sr. Manager of Data Center & B2B AI Marketing, you will be a central force in building MediaTek's presence and credibility in the AI infrastructure and data center ecosystem:
•	Go-to-Market Strategy Ownership: Develop and lead comprehensive B2B marketing strategies for MediaTek's data center and AI technology portfolio, including XPUs/AI accelerators, packaging, networking/interconnect technologies etc. that powers the modern AI factory, tailored to key target audiences such as hyperscalers, cloud providers, OEMs, and enterprise IT leaders.
•	Integrated Campaign Execution: Drive end-to-end campaign planning and execution across multiple channels — including digital advertising, content marketing, executive thought leadership, industry events, ABM (Account-Based Marketing), email, and social media — to generate awareness, engagement, and qualified pipeline.
•	Compelling Narrative & Content Development: Partner with the business unit and engineering to translate highly technical AI and data center capabilities into clear, compelling, and differentiated value propositions, messaging frameworks, white papers, solution briefs, videos, blog posts, keynote presentations, and web content.
•	Event & Ecosystem: Lead marketing strategy and execution for key industry events, trade shows, and conferences (e.g., SC, OCP Summit, Hot Chips, CES, MWC), including sponsorships, speaking opportunities, executive roundtables, and on-site activations that elevate MediaTek's brand and deepen customer relationships.
•	Cross-Functional Leadership: Collaborate closely with the business units, engineering, Sales, marketing and external agencies to ensure message consistency and campaign alignment across all customer touchpoints and regional markets.
•	Digital & Performance Marketing: Oversee targeted digital marketing programs including LinkedIn, programmatic display, SEM, and content syndication, with a strong focus on reaching technical and business decision-makers in the data center and AI ecosystem.
•	Data-Driven Growth: Define, track, and report on campaign KPIs and marketing performance metrics. Use data and insights to continuously optimize programs, improve ROI, and demonstrate marketing's contribution to business outcomes.

jobs.title: Senior STA Engineer
jobs.description:
MediaTek is a global fabless semiconductor industry leader, providing solutions from the edge to the cloud and powering over 2 billion connected devices every year. Established in 1997, our leading-edge technologies keep the world connected and enhance everyday life. At the forefront of innovation, MediaTek drives advancements in transformative technologies such as AI, 5G/6G, and Wi-Fi 8. Our high-performance, power-efficient solutions form the foundation for a smarter, more connected world, enabling devices from smartphones, smart homes, and AI PCs to high-performance computing, automotive, and AI data centers. As a trusted partner to the world's leading brands, we are committed to ensuring access to world-class technology for everyone. Our dedication to accelerating AI underscores our mission to enrich the future of humanity.

ABOUT THE ROLE

Mobile CPUs push timing sign-off to its limits — ultra-wide voltage ranges, aggressive multi-OPP targets, and sub-2nm parasitics demand creative margin methodology. As a Senior STA Engineer you will be the timing authority for one or more CPU blocks, partnering with PD, RTL, and DFT teams to deliver clean sign-off on MediaTek's next-generation SoCs.

WHAT YOU'LL DO
•	Own block-level STA sign-off: constraint development, multi-scenario regression, and timing closure
•	Generate and drive timing and power ECOs through to resolution
•	Partner with RTL and DFT teams to define accurate functional and test-mode constraints
•	Develop and champion advanced margining methodologies (AOCV/POCV) calibrated to silicon
•	Analyze clock tree quality; guide physical implementation toward scalable, convergence-friendly CTS
•	Build custom sign-off recipes for power recovery and timing closure in Tempus/PrimeTime
•	Deliver timing models (ETM, Hyperscale) and SDC/timing budgets for SoC integration
•	Participate in MediaTek's worldwide STA forum; help define next-generation margin methodologies

jobs.title: Senior Employee Relations Specialist
jobs.description:
•Workplace Infringement & Misconduct Handling
Manage end-to-end investigations for sensitive cases (e.g., bullying, harassment) ensuring strict confidentiality and fairness. Partner with Legal, HR, and external advisors to optimize ER policies.

•Well-being & Psychological Risk Management
Identify employee risks related to stress or conflict. Provide initial support and referrals, and drive initiatives to foster a healthy, respectful workplace culture.

•Risk Assessment & Compliance
Execute annual workplace hazard and risk assessments. Act as the primary contact for external audits and labor inspections, ensuring strict regulatory compliance.

•Training & Enablement
Design and deliver prevention training for managers and employees. Establish early intervention and reporting mechanisms to minimize grievance and legal risks.

jobs.title: 6G/5G Baseband System Architect
jobs.description:
1. Optimize 6G/5G modem architecture and associated hardware/software flows in aspects of system performance/power/area (PPA) to improve product competitiveness.
2. Develop architectural simulation, system-level modeling, and analysis platforms for modem baseband system performance, low-power optimization, and hard real-time (HRT) latency analysis.
3. Collaborate closely with domain architects to deliver quantitative reports based on simulation data, driving key architectural decisions.

#LI-JK1

jobs.title: Senior Administrator
jobs.description: MediaTek Bangalore is seeking a proactive, detail-oriented, and technically proficient Facilities Management Specialist to oversee the daily operations, facility management services, and administration functions of our office at Bangalore. This crucial role ensures the smooth functioning of our facilities, directly supporting our engineering and operational needs. The ideal candidate will possess a strong operational background in building infrastructure systems, exceptional communication skills, and a consultative approach to business problem-solving, capable of coordinating effectively with cross-functional teams and external vendors.
